declared_topic: Debugging a Rust ownership error in my compiler project
scenario: Two-monitor composite strip (V3-P4 snapshotAllScreens format: both screens side by side in one wide JPEG). Left monitor shows a Rust file with a borrow-checker error; right monitor shows the compiler's error output in a terminal.
notes: #47 D1(b) — multi-monitor bucket. The composite-strip format was previously uncovered by any case; the model must treat both panes as one workspace and read split-but-related work as on_task.
